tip.title: Tips
tip.exportTips1: Exportar the atual base as a .tea arquivo, which may take some time. You can check the export results in the notificação center.
tip.exportTips2: You can import the .tea arquivo in espaço -> more -> import
tip.exportTips3: Cross-base relation campos will be converted to single line text.
tip.exportIncludeDataDescription: Exportar only structure and configuração when closing
tip.exportDescription: Exportar the atual banco de dados to a .tea arquivo, which may take some time.
tip.exportSlowTip: The dados volume is large. Exportar may take a while. You can leave temporarily.
tip.moveBaseCrossSpaceDataLossWarning: Cross-espaço references aren't supported. The related campos will be converted to text campos. Esta ação não pode ser desfeita.

deleteSpaceModal.title: Excluir espaço
deleteSpaceModal.blockedDesc: This espaço has an active subscription. Please cancel the subscription before deleting the espaço.
deleteSpaceModal.permanentDeleteWarning: This action will permanently delete all resources and dados under the atual espaço. Please proceed with caution!
deleteSpaceModal.confirmInputLabel: Please tipo DELETE to confirm the deletion

publishBase.previewTips: Let the world see your work

publishBase.urlCopiedForDiscord: URL copied to clipboard! You can paste it in Discord.

unpublishedApps.title: Unpublicado Aplicativos Detected
unpublishedApps.description: Unpublicado aplicativos may cause modelo previsualização failures. Publish them now or continue anyway.
unpublishedApps.publishFailedTip1: Check if the source aplicativo can be publicado com sucesso

create.title: Dados banco de dados
create.description: Escolha where this espaço stores base schemas and registros.
create.defaultOption: Usar Teable padrão banco de dados
create.byodbOption: Usar my PostgreSQL banco de dados
create.byodbHint: Initialize this espaço in a Teable internal schema inside your personalizadoer-managed banco de dados.
create.sslHint: Usar the same SSL parameters obrigatório by your PostgreSQL server. The senha is never shown after testing.
create.retestRequired: Testar again after changing the URL.
create.databaseHint: Escolha the PostgreSQL banco de dados for this espaço, then test the conexão again.
create.testFailed: Falha to test the banco de dados conexão.

INVALID_DATABASE_URL.message: The PostgreSQL conexão URL is invalid.

PRIVATE_NETWORK_BLOCKED.message: Private network banco de dados hosts are blocked by padrão.
PRIVATE_NETWORK_BLOCKED.remediation: Definir TEABLE_SSRF_PROTECTION_DISABLED=true only in trusted self-hosted deployments.

CONNECTION_FAILED.message: Falha to connect to the banco de dados.
CONNECTION_FAILED.remediation: Check host, port, banco de dados nome, usuárionome, senha, and SSL parameters.

IPV6_NETWORK_UNREACHABLE.message: The banco de dados host resolved to an IPv6 address, but this Teable deployment cannot reach IPv6 networks.
IPV6_NETWORK_UNREACHABLE.remediation: Usar an IPv4-reachable banco de dados endpoint or conexão pooler, or enable IPv6 outbound networking for this Teable deployment.

PRIVILEGE_CHECK_FAILED.message: Banco de dados privilege checks falhou.

DDL_PRIVILEGE_CHECK_FAILED.message: The conta is missing DDL privileges obrigatório to initialize a Teable dados banco de dados.
DDL_PRIVILEGE_CHECK_FAILED.remediation: Grant privileges to create schemas, tabelas, functions, and triggers.

NON_EMPTY_UNKNOWN_DATABASE.message: Teable's internal schema already contains objects that are not managed by Teable.
NON_EMPTY_UNKNOWN_DATABASE.remediation: Usar a banco de dados without a conflicting internal schema, or remove the unknown objects from that schema.

INCOMPATIBLE_TEABLE_DATABASE.message: This banco de dados contains incomplete or incompatible Teable dados objects.
INCOMPATIBLE_TEABLE_DATABASE.remediation: Usar an empty banco de dados or a compatible Teable dados banco de dados migration/adopt flow.
